intro:
Bumble has a strong presence in France. Embir is available in France as part of its worldwide web launch — with verified profiles, bidirectional orientation filtering, and full features core connection features are free.

Fruitz and Happn are strong in France alongside Bumble. Embir offers a verified, fully inclusive alternative.

sections.title: Embir in France — the better alternative
sections.content: Bumble has name recognition in France, but Embir offers something fundamentally better: strict bidirectional orientation filtering, verified profiles, reporting and blocking, and complete free access to core connection features.
